name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

<!-- What are you trying to do? A concrete example beats an abstract request. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would the change look like from a caller's perspective? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you try or consider, and why did you rule it out? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Related issues, prior art in other memory/MCP tools, screenshots, etc. -->

---

Before opening: if this touches storage, transports, the `kind` vocabulary, or the observation model, read [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) first. Rivermind has opinionated constraints — proposals that cut against them may be closed unless the use case is strong.
